title: Indie Furniture
description: Decorate your world with Indie games inspired furniture!
body:
![Sigil/Banner Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1a4837082ecef554044810b4c5eb868ed8c3d95.png)
**✨ Decorate your home with Furniture from popular Indie Games!**

## Currently, the mod has decoration from:
- Hades;
- Hollow Knight;
- Stardew Valley;
- Celeste;

## On top of that, Sigils/Banners from:
- **Hades;**
- **Hollow Knight;**
- **Celeste;**
- **Among Us;**
- **Stardew Valley;**
- **Balatro;**
- **Omori;**
- **Shovel Knight;**
- **Deltarune;**

![Hades Furniture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c73964db6e3c86488c87169cf5f1d33db78bfc.png)
![Hades Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e36c9b92a513dca55d8436acaa0d0aeed74c25e6.png)
